end,function(e,A)local m=Y(A)local M=function(M,T,c,C,r)return X(e,{M,T;c,C;r},A,m)end return M end,function(e,A)local m=Y(A)local M=function(M,T,c,C)return X(e,{M;T,c,C},A,m)end return M end,{},function(e,A)local m=Y(A)local M=function(M,T)return X(e,{M;T},A,m)end return M end,function(e,A)local m=Y(A)local M=function(M,T,c,C,r,W,s,v,F,Y)return X(e,{M,T;c;C,r,W,s;v;F;Y},A,m)end return M end return(I(13142776-(-477335),{}))(m(r))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[A(-767912+776336)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
